description: Feature queue M.E.R.L.I.N. — S1 COMPLETE. S2+S3+S4 active. 15 pending.

sprints.S1: COMPLETE — Core loop jouable, bugs critiques fixes, LLM valide
sprints.S2: CONTENU & SYSTEMES — biomes, verbes, MOS, cleanup restant
sprints.S3: POLISH & ROBUSTESSE — edge cases, LLM robustesse, UX, pixel render
sprints.S4: INTEGRATION & EXPORT — web build, CI/CD, demo jouable

rules.auto_generate_when_below: If fewer than 10 pending tasks remain, read docs/DEV_PLAN_V2.5.md and docs/GAME_DESIGN_BIBLE.md to generate new tasks until 10+ pending.
rules.task_decomposition: Each task must be completable in 1 cycle (~15 min). Break large features into atomic tasks.
rules.priority_algorithm: P0=critical bugs, P1-P5=sprint current, P6-P10=sprint next, P11+=backlog

tasks.title: Cycle jour/nuit PS1 + DA cohérente toutes scènes (remplace S3-AMBIENT + S3-PIXEL)
tasks.description: Director q-20260413-003 + q-20260412-002 + q-20260412-004: Unified visual task replacing S3-AMBIENT-LIGHTING and S3-PIXEL-RENDER. Cycle jour/nuit en mode PS1 avec volumétrie. Temps réel machine/serveur pour saisons et cycle quotidien. DA cohérente entre TOUTES les scènes et animations. Effets visuels: pixel snap, affine textures, low-poly volumetric fog, dithering shadows, viewport scale. Exposer time_of_day + season dans run state + LLM context. Tout doit être driver sous la même logique graphique. Director note: 'toute la DA doit être cohérente entre toutes les scènes, animations. Tout doit être driver sous la même logique graphique sur l'ensemble des rendus graphiques.'

tasks.title: Typographie hybride: titre celtique + corps sans-serif
tasks.description: Director q-003: FONT_TITLE (celtique) + FONT_BODY (sans-serif) dans MerlinVisual.

tasks.title: Implementer evaluation arc_condition_type: runs_in_biome et fins_vues
tasks.description: Two new arc_condition_type values added by S2-BIOMES: 'runs_in_biome' (landes_bruyere: value=3) and 'fins_vues' (collines_dolmens: value=5). These need evaluation code in the MOS/arc-condition checker. Currently only 'faction_rep' and 'oghams_owned' are evaluated. Fix: (1) Find where arc_condition_type is evaluated (merlin_skeleton_generator.gd:42, llm_adapter_map_prompt.gd:59-96). (2) Add 'runs_in_biome' case: meta.biome_runs.get(biome_id, 0) >= arc_condition_value (NOTE: field is 'biome_runs' NOT 'biome_run_counts' — see PAT-049). (3) Add 'fins_vues' case: meta.fins_vues >= arc_condition_value. (4) Verify meta has the needed fields (biome_runs dict, fins_vues int). Add constants ARC_CONDITION_TYPES array for documentation.

tasks.title: Memoire narrative: RAG pour resume compresse story_log
tasks.description: Director q-001: RAG-based narrative memory. add_narrative_entry() per card, get_narrative_summary() for 3-5 items.

tasks.title: Configurer export web HTML5 automatise
tasks.description: Setup Godot HTML5 export. Verify SharedArrayBuffer headers. Output to web-export/.

tasks.title: Refonte Menu Principal
tasks.description: Meilleure introduction, shaders et graphismes PS1 avec bonne volumétrie et cycle jour/nuit, la scène doit être plus viable. Deep dive et itère jusqu'à acceptation du retour correct

tasks.title: Add amb_iles ambient sound for iles_celtes biome
tasks.description: S4-SFXMANAGER-AUDIT: 7/8 biome ambients registered. Missing: amb_iles for iles_celtes biome. SFXManager.play_biome_ambient('iles') silently fails. Fix: (1) Add gen_amb_iles() to SFXRecipesAmbient (ocean waves: low freq sine sweep + white noise, ~2s loop). (2) Add 'amb_iles' to names[] in SFXManager._generate_all_sounds(). LOW priority — iles_celtes is a late-game biome (maturity score 45+).

tasks.title: Add fins_vues + echo_memory to _validate() required_keys
tasks.description: SPECIALIST-9 CHK-7: _validate() required_keys (merlin_save_system.gd:244) missing 'fins_vues', 'echo_memory', 'run_history', 'whispers_seen'. These fields exist in _get_default_profile() but are not validated. Add them to required_keys so a save missing fins_vues triggers default-fill warning + logs. Trivial: add 4 strings to the required_keys array.

tasks.title: Verify S2-ARC-CONDITION-EVAL: runs_in_biome + fins_vues condition evaluation
tasks.description: Run AFTER S2-ARC-CONDITION-EVAL (P16) completes. Verify: (1) Arc condition evaluator handles 'runs_in_biome' — checks meta.biome_run_counts.get(biome_id, 0) >= value. (2) Handles 'fins_vues' — checks meta.fins_vues (or equivalent counter) >= value. (3) Existing conditions 'faction_rep' and 'oghams_owned' still evaluate correctly (regression). (4) landes_bruyere arc unlocks when runs_in_biome >= 3. (5) collines_dolmens arc unlocks when fins_vues >= 5. (6) meta has the required fields (biome_run_counts dict, fins_vues int) — if missing, flag as FAIL_CRITICAL.

tasks.title: Refactor _reduce() megafunction: dispatch to sub-reducers
tasks.description: SPECIALIST-10 PQ-005: _reduce() at line 243 is 256 lines — 5x function limit. It's a giant match block handling ALL action types. Refactor: extract 4 sub-reducer helpers called from _reduce(): _reduce_run_actions(), _reduce_meta_actions(), _reduce_ui_actions(), _reduce_system_actions(). Each sub-reducer takes (state, action_type, payload) and returns bool (handled). _reduce() dispatches to correct sub-reducer based on action prefix. Maintains same external API. No logic changes — pure structural split.

tasks.title: Split _resolve_choice() in merlin_game_controller.gd (211 lines)
tasks.description: SPECIALIST-10 PQ-006: _resolve_choice() at line 499 is 211 lines. Mixed UI transitions + game state mutation + LLM trigger. Extract: (1) _resolve_choice_validate(choice_idx) -> bool — validates choice index bounds. (2) _resolve_choice_apply_effects(card, choice_idx) — calls store.dispatch() for game effects. (3) _resolve_choice_transition() — handles fade-out + scene transition. (4) _resolve_choice_trigger_llm() — schedules next card generation. Keep _resolve_choice() as orchestrator calling these 4 helpers in sequence. Each helper < 50 lines.

tasks.title: Split _wrap_text_as_card() in merlin_llm_adapter.gd (222 lines)
tasks.description: SPECIALIST-10 PQ-007: _wrap_text_as_card() at line 435 is 222 lines — parses raw LLM text, validates structure, and wraps into card dict all in one function. Extract: (1) _parse_raw_llm_text(text) -> Dictionary — parses options/title/effects from raw text. (2) _validate_card_structure(card) -> bool — checks required fields, effect caps, option count. (3) _wrap_text_as_card() becomes orchestrator calling parse → validate → assemble. Each helper < 60 lines.

tasks.title: Extract _poll_bg_tasks() + _poll_swarm_health() from _process() in merlin_ai.gd
tasks.description: SPECIALIST-10 PQ-008: _process() at line 2045 is 68 lines — exceeds 50-line limit. Logic: (1) swarm scheduler timeout check, (2) legacy timeout check, (3) poll active bg tasks, (4) dispatch queue. Extract: _poll_swarm_health() (lines ~2053-2076), _poll_legacy_timeouts() (lines ~2077-2086), _poll_active_tasks() -> Array[int] (lines ~2090-2107), process_completed_tasks(indices) (lines ~2109-2124). _process() becomes 20 lines calling these helpers. set_process(false) guard preserved.

tasks.title: Reduce 5+ level nesting in llm_adapter_text_sanitizer.gd
tasks.description: SPECIALIST-10 PQ-009: 22 instances of 5+ tab nesting in blacklist filtering and label extraction loops (lines 127-189). Use early-return guards and const extraction to flatten. Pattern: for word in list: if word in blacklist: (5 tabs deep) → replace with: if _is_blacklisted(word): continue. Extract _is_blacklisted() helper + NON_VERB_BLACKLIST const at class level.

tasks.title: Audit + fix parchment_display add_child orphan risk in merlin_game_controller.gd
tasks.description: SPECIALIST-10 PQ-010: _resolve_choice() calls add_child(_parchment) at line 317 but parchment node has no explicit queue_free or signal disconnect on scene exit. Risk: if _resolve_choice() is called while a previous parchment is still transitioning, duplicate nodes accumulate. Fix: (1) Check is_instance_valid(_parchment) + _parchment.is_inside_tree() before add_child. (2) Store reference and call queue_free on previous if still alive. (3) Or use CONNECT_ONE_SHOT pattern for animation_finished signal to auto-cleanup.
